title: erodium cicutarium subsp. microphyllum
intro: Erodium cicutarium subsp. microphyllum, also known as small-leaved heron's bill, is a subspecies of the annual herb Erodium cicutarium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues. Erodium cicutarium subsp. microphyllum can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems can also be used in herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and salves.
